summary: READY with four kept families: two executable-now lines for immediate pr1394 harness validation on downstream `score_bpb`, plus two honest deferred families that stay blocked until new runtime primitives exist.
campaign_goal: Validate the pg_enigma campaign harness on the fixed `frontier_rebase/pr1394/train_gpt_human.py` base by enforcing downstream-only control-paired comparison first, then testing same-trace checkpoint/export selection, while carrying recurrence handoff and shared-trunk late branching as deferred next mechanisms once the harness exposes the needed primitives.

families.name: Control-Paired Delta Admission On Downstream Sliding Score
families.why_keep: It fixes the comparison law for the whole cycle and directly addresses pack-specific noise on the real downstream lane.
families.minimal_probe: Run one 8-slot frontier selector pack with 2 exact controls, 2 replay-equivalent control clones, and 4 novel slots. Admit only by pack-local delta to paired controls on downstream `quantized_sliding_window` `score_bpb`.
families.expected_signal: Control clones define a stable noise band and at least one non-control clears that band on downstream `score_bpb` without relying on pre-quant ranking.
families.pack_rationale: Run first because every later executable solo pack should inherit this admission law instead of absolute-score ranking.

families.name: Checkpoint And Export Selector Family
families.why_keep: It is the cleanest consequential family that can run now: same-trace artifact choice may beat the default final checkpoint/export pair on downstream `score_bpb`.
families.minimal_probe: From one training trace, evaluate a bounded late-checkpoint window against a fixed small export menu, with 2 controls carrying the published default checkpoint/export choice.
families.expected_signal: A non-default checkpoint/export pair wins on downstream `score_bpb` by more than control spread, and the winner is not recoverable from final-step or pre-quant ranking alone.
families.pack_rationale: Run immediately after control-delta calibration because it is executable now, lane-aligned, and tests a first-order searchable object without inventing new training machinery.

families.name: State-Triggered Recurrence Handoff Program
families.why_keep: It attacks a concrete invariant in `train_gpt_human.py`: recurrence timing is fixed by `ENABLE_LOOPING_AT` instead of a searched handoff program.
families.minimal_probe: After adding runtime state-conditioned control hooks, run a mid-training pack with 2 controls, one coarse late handoff realization, and one signal-triggered handoff realization, with final judgment on downstream `score_bpb`.
families.expected_signal: A handoff realization shows a cleaner post-transition trajectory and then a downstream `score_bpb` gain beyond control spread at matched wall-clock budget.
families.pack_rationale: Keep deferred until the primitive exists; when unblocked, it must earn solo support in its own mid-training pack before any composition.

families.name: Shared-Trunk Late-Branch Portfolio
families.why_keep: It changes compute topology rather than a finisher knob and is the strongest honest branch/composition line once shared-trunk resume exists.
families.minimal_probe: After branch-resume support exists, fork 2 to 4 late finishers from one trunk checkpoint plus 2 single-path controls and compare marginal downstream gain per extra finisher budget.
families.expected_signal: At least one branch beats the single-path control on downstream `score_bpb` beyond control spread while using less total compute than training the same number of full independent runs.
families.pack_rationale: Keep deferred and only admit after solo families exist; this is a composition family, not a first-pack candidate.

stop_doing: Do not admit or promote training-side families on pre-quant ranking; keep downstream `quantized_sliding_window` `score_bpb` as the campaign law.
Do not pretend blocked controller or branch families are executable in the current catalog.
Do not split ontology into narrow children like EMA-only selectors or recurrence ramps before the parent family survives.
Do not run pairwise or hybrid composition before solo survival with repeated control-paired support.

pack_order: trajectory_003/trajectory_003_h3 solo same-trace selector packs under calibrated delta law
trajectory_004/trajectory_004_h3 deferred mid-training solo packs after state-trigger primitive exists
trajectory_004/trajectory_004_h4 deferred pairwise composition packs after branch-resume primitive exists and at least one solo family survives
notes: Solo packs come before any composition.
Executable packs should use 6 candidate slots plus 2 controls.
`trajectory_004/trajectory_004_h1` is the admission law for every executable pack, not a license to mix lanes.
Blocked families stay out of active packs until their primitive backlog is closed.

promotion_policy.family_survival_rule: A family survives only after at least 2 realizations beat paired controls on downstream `score_bpb` in its claimed lane, with one additional non-negative replication or stable control-band confirmation. This creates confidence lineage from pack-local calibration to repeated directional wins.
promotion_policy.composition_entry_rule: Enter pairwise composition only after a family has solo survival lineage: calibrated control band, repeated downstream-positive realizations, and no lane-integrity violations. Blocked families cannot enter until their first executable solo pack meets the same rule.

composition_policy.hybrid_entry_rule: A hybrid is allowed only after pairwise support shows the combined family beats both solo parents and paired controls on downstream `score_bpb` across repeated realizations; otherwise keep the families separate.
notes: Treat `trajectory_004/trajectory_004_h1` as campaign infrastructure, not as a compositional model feature.
Do not compose blocked families speculatively.
Do not pair `trajectory_004/trajectory_004_h4` with `trajectory_003/trajectory_003_h3` as separate top-level families; selector logic can live inside a branch portfolio once that primitive exists.

campaign_handoff.global_instructions: Use `ncycle/pr1394_enigma_cycle.json` against the frozen `frontier_rebase/pr1394/train_gpt_human.py` base, with `frontier_rebase/pr1394/README.md` and `frontier_rebase/pr1394/submission.json` as the base contract. Execute solo packs first, always with 2 controls and up to 6 candidate slots, judge admission and promotion only on downstream `quantized_sliding_window` `score_bpb`, and record pack-local deltas to paired controls before promoting any family.
control_principles: Keep the published SP8192 + GPTQ embeddings + depth recurrence + MuonEq-R + SDClip stack frozen for all family admission comparisons.
Include 2 controls in every executable pack; for calibration packs use replay-equivalent control clones to estimate pack-local noise.
Never let a pre-quant improvement override a downstream-negative result.
admission_principles: Run `trajectory_004/trajectory_004_h1` first and reuse its delta law for every later executable solo pack.
Promote only families that beat the paired-control band on downstream `score_bpb` with repeated directional support.
Keep `trajectory_004/trajectory_004_h3` and `trajectory_004/trajectory_004_h4` deferred until their required primitives exist.
metric_principles: Primary metric is downstream `score_bpb` from `quantized_sliding_window` when present.
Use pre-quant `val_bpb` only as secondary evidence for diagnosis or early kill guards.
Use artifact size only as a tie-breaker after downstream and pre-quant evidence already agree.
implementation_principles: Be exact about catalog coverage: executable-now means current harness support; otherwise leave the family blocked with explicit primitive backlog.
Keep probes minimal and lane-aligned: same-trace selector tests for selector families, mid-training probes for handoff programs, pairwise packs for branch portfolios.
When a blocked family becomes runnable, start with its smallest decisive probe rather than a widened mutation slate.
